channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: hijkzzz/Awesome-LLM-Strawberry
item.description: A collection of LLM papers, blogs, and projects, with a focus on OpenAI o1 🍓 and reasoning techniques.

item.title: pathwaycom/llm-app
item.description: Ready-to-run cloud templates for RAG, AI pipelines, and enterprise search with live data. 🐳Docker-friendly.⚡Always in sync with Sharepoint, Google Drive, S3, Kafka, PostgreSQL, real-time data APIs, and more.

item.title: emmabostian/developer-portfolios
item.description: A list of developer portfolios for your inspiration

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: Hack-with-Github/Awesome-Hacking
item.description: A collection of various awesome lists for hackers, pentesters and security researchers

item.title: prakhar1989/awesome-courses
item.description: 📚 List of awesome university courses for learning Computer Science!

item.title: birobirobiro/awesome-shadcn-ui
item.description: A curated list of awesome things related to shadcn/ui.

item.title: lukasz-madon/awesome-remote-job
item.description: A curated list of awesome remote jobs and resources. Inspired by https://github.com/vinta/awesome-python
